entries.summary: Phase 1 Full Application Audit completed. Audit deliverable matches spec: 13 findings documented across all specified areas (auth, security, database, frontend, games, AI, build, tests). Findings correctly identify real drifts between the current codebase state and the spec requirements — this is the expected output of an audit phase. The audit itself has zero implementation drift from its spec.
entries.requirementCoverage: All 12 FRs covered by audit findings. SC-001 (security): 2 security findings documented. SC-002 (completeness): 42 routes verified. SC-003 (build/test): build passes, 144 tests pass. SC-004 (report): 13 findings by severity with reproduction steps and fix directions.
